text:
The Giant Tree Frog is an anime-only animal in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 2 (1999) 

Appearance

The Giant Tree Frog is roughly the same size as a Frog-In-Waiting, it has pale green skin, and big red eyes. 

Behavior

During rainy weather, they are known to go berserk. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

A tour guide to the animal show held on Whale Island, introduces the Giant Tree Frog and details that it goes berserk when it rains and that its name is "Gaeru-chan". Later, Gon releases all of the caged animals at the animal show. 

References

 

fr:Gaeru-chan
